title: syzygium conicum
intro: Syzygium conicum, also known as the water berry or water cherry, is a type of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. The plant is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Syzygium conicum include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Syzygium conicum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
